description: Dest pipeline for m_26_14-score-dataset-retention transform. Projects a m_26_14-retention doc into a m_26_14-scores dataset_retention doc. Enriches config thresholds and runs the retention_level ladder (same logic as score.py retention_level() with single-axis empirical horizon: s_days == r_days == horizon_days). Deterministic _id = 'dataset::<dataset>' so each run upserts in place.

enrich.description: Bring in config thresholds for retention ladder

script.description: Compute retention level and shape dataset_retention score doc
script.source: def th = ctx._cfg?.thresholds?.retention; if (th == null) { th = ['l1_retrievable_days': 180, 'l2_retrievable_days': 365, 'l3_searchable_days': 90, 'l3_retrievable_days': 365, 'l4_searchable_days': 180, 'l4_retrievable_days': 365]; } double h = ctx.horizon_days != null ? (double)ctx.horizon_days : 0.0; int score = 0; if (h >= (double)th.l4_searchable_days && h >= (double)th.l4_retrievable_days) score = 4; else if (h >= (double)th.l3_searchable_days && h >= (double)th.l3_retrievable_days) score = 3; else if (h >= (double)th.l2_retrievable_days) score = 2; else if (h >= (double)th.l1_retrievable_days) score = 1; String ds = ctx.dataset ?: ''; ctx.element = 'dataset_retention'; ctx.score = (byte)score; ctx.asset = ['id': 'dataset:' + ds]; ctx.run_id = 'engine'; ctx.effective_horizon_days = h; ctx.evidence = ['horizon_days': h, 'effective_searchable_days': h, 'effective_retrievable_days': h, 'first_log': ctx.first_log, 'last_log': ctx.last_log, 'basis': 'empirical_min_timestamp']; ctx._id = 'dataset::' + ds; ctx.remove('_cfg'); ctx.remove('config_key'); ctx.remove('data_stream');
